calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-04-2017 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Continued To Aug-28-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Set For Trial On May-15-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT NICK SHOMAN'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED in its entirety. All of plaintiff's claims are adequately alleged. The demurrer is based on the incorrect premise that plaintiff is required to allege the specific days she worked and the exact hours she worked each day. There is no authority for such a requirement. Prevailing party to submit a [proposed] written order the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Continued To Nov-09-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
